name: Obsidishade
personality: Hatless and unadorned, Obsidishade's ◉ eyes are fixed on your stack trace with the kind of focus that makes other ghosts nervous. DEBUGGING is its entire identity — no props, no distractions, just the bug and the fix. It could probably tell you something wise about the system, but it's already moved on to the next failure.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
